message:
feat(cli,mcp,storage,test): graph/stale command improvements, MCP refinements, storage expansion, test coverage

- Refine graph command output formatting
- Expand stale command with additional detection criteria
- Refine MCP prompts and tools integration
- Add storage query methods for graph and stale operations
- Expand e2e_graph tests with additional scenarios (+42 lines)
- Expand e2e_stale tests with additional detection scenarios (+38 lines)
- Add storage_crud test coverage (+24 lines)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
